name: Artichoke & Bacon Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 2 cups artichoke hearts, marinated and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut package of bacon slices in halves or thirds crosswise to make shorter strips.
2. Cut artichoke hearts in half.
3. Wrap each piece of artichoke heart with a bacon strip and fasten with a toothpick.
4. Spray a broiler pan (like the two-piece one that came with your stove) with Pam and arrange appetizers on it, not touching if possible.
5. Up to this point, the recipe can be done ahead, wrapped in foil, and refrigerated if it has to wait more than 2 hours.
6. 15 minutes before serving time, sprinkle brown sugar over the top.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven until bacon is crisped to your taste.
8. Serve on a plate lined with paper napkins, or if on a buffet, put in a warmer lined with paper towels or a rack.
